\label{sec:ergaenztabellen}

% Trainingsdaten

\begin{sidewaystable}[!h]
    \centering
    \small
    \begin{tabular}{lllllllll}\hline
         \textbf{db\_name} & \textbf{id} & \textbf{brand} & \textbf{model} & \textbf{content\_source} & \textbf{content\_
type}& \textbf{media\_
type}& \textbf{processing} & \textbf{tampering} \\\hline
         VISION & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & FLAT & MP4 & ORIGINAL & NATIVE \\\hline
         VISION & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & FLAT & MP4 & WHATSAPP & NATIVE \\\hline
         VISION & D02 & Apple & iPhone4s & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & FLAT & MOV & ORIGINAL & NATIVE \\\hline
         EVA-7K & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & INDOOR & MP4 & FACEBOOK & NATIVE \\\hline
         EVA-7K & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & INDOOR & MP4 & FACEBOOK & AVIDEMUX \\\hline
         EVA-7K & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & INDOOR & MP4 & FACEBOOK & EXIFTOOL \\\hline
         EVA-7K & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & INDOOR & MP4 & FACEBOOK & FFMPEG3 \\\hline
         EVA-7K & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & INDOOR & MP4 & FACEBOOK & KDENLIVE \\\hline
         EVA-7K & D01 & Samsung & GalaxyS3Mini & DIGITAL\_CAMERA & INDOOR & MP4 & FACEBOOK & PREMIERE \\\hline
         AI & AI01 & GoogleFlow & OmniFlash & AI\_GENERATION & SYNTHETIC & MP4 & ORIGINAL & NATIVE \\\hline
         AI & AI01 & GoogleFlow & OmniFlash & MIXED & DEEPFAKE & MP4 & ORIGINAL & NATIVE \\\hline
         AI & AI04 & Grok & Imagine1.5 & MIXED & DEEPFAKE & MP4 & ORIGINAL & NATIVE \\\hline
    \end{tabular}
\caption{Auszug ausgewählter Metadatenspalten aus dem Trainingsdatensatz mit dem Vision- \cite{shullani_vision_2017} , EVA-7K- \cite{yang_efficient_2020} und KI-Datensatz (eigene Darstellung)}
\label{tab:train}
\end{sidewaystable}
